personal.name: Pratham Patil
personal.title: Generative AI Engineer
personal.bio: AI & ML engineering graduate specializing in Generative AI — building end-to-end LLM systems across RAG pipelines, agentic document workflows, and production observability stacks. Proficient with the modern GenAI toolchain: LangChain, LangGraph, ChromaDB, FastAPI and GitHub Actions CI/CD.
personal.closingBio: Looking to join a team where shipping real AI products matters more than experimenting in notebooks. Let's build something meaningful together.
story: I'm an AI & ML engineering graduate from PES's Modern College of Engineering, Pune, specializing in Generative AI. I build end-to-end LLM systems — from RAG pipelines and agentic document workflows to production observability stacks.

My work spans the modern GenAI toolchain: LangChain, LangGraph, ChromaDB, FastAPI, and GitHub Actions CI/CD. I've shipped projects like CodeNarrator, an autonomous documentation and video synthesis system, and a full LLM observability pipeline with RAGAS-based CI/CD evaluation.

I believe in building AI products that work in production, not just in notebooks. Every project I take on is driven by real-world utility — measurable performance, clean architecture, and observable systems.

experience.title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
experience.description: Worked on data-driven marketing analytics and ML-driven digital strategy initiatives. Applied data preprocessing, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis on marketing and user engagement datasets to surface actionable insights.
achievements: Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and EDA on marketing and user engagement datasets using Pandas
Surfaced data-driven insights that informed branding and campaign strategies
Collaborated with marketing, design, and web teams to apply ML-driven analytics to digital content strategy
Contributed to data pipeline development for automated reporting workflows

education.institution: PES's Modern College of Engineering, Pune

projects.title: Code Narrator
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Documentation & Video Synthesis System
projects.description: An AI-powered system that automatically transforms GitHub repositories into comprehensive video tutorials with chapter-by-chapter markdown documentation and fully narrated MP4 videos — no manual intervention required.
projects.longDescription: CodeNarrator uses a dual-pipeline agentic architecture (PocketFlow AsyncFlow + Sync Flow) to convert any GitHub repository into structured Markdown tutorials and narrated 1920×1080 MP4 videos. Integrates Google Gemini 2.5 Flash with multi-provider LLM failover, prompt caching, and YAML validation. Features a FastAPI backend with real-time job tracking and a Next.js frontend with live chapter counters, video playback controls, and multi-language support (English, Hindi, Spanish, French). Supports three voice styles and three visual themes.

projects.title: RetrieveX
projects.subtitle: LLM-Powered Intelligent Query Retrieval System
projects.description: A production-ready RAG system that processes large PDF documents and delivers intelligent, contextual answers for insurance, legal, HR, and compliance use cases using semantic search and GPT-4.
projects.longDescription: Processes large documents through a pipeline of PDF text extraction, normalization, and vector embedding generation stored in Pinecone. Uses Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) reranking for precise semantic search, then generates answers via GPT-4 with context attribution. Includes Bearer token authentication, embedding caching for performance optimization, and a RESTful API with structured JSON responses. Deployed with Docker.

projects.title: YouTube Q&A
projects.subtitle: RAG-Based Video Intelligence System
projects.description: A RAG pipeline that transcribes YouTube audio via Whisper, indexes timestamped chunks into ChromaDB, and answers natural language queries with exact video moment citations.
projects.longDescription: Built with LangChain and ChromaDB, this system transcribes YouTube videos using OpenAI Whisper and indexes timestamped chunks for semantic retrieval. Achieved 89% faithfulness and 84% context recall on a 20-question RAGAS benchmark via chunk tuning (1000 → 512 tokens). Reduced API cost ~60% through session-level vector store caching with video ID deduplication. Implements conversational memory via LangChain ConversationalRetrievalChain with async RAGAS scoring post-response to avoid latency overhead. Deployed on Streamlit Cloud.

projects.title: AI Performance Monitor
projects.subtitle: LLM Observability & CI/CD Evaluation Pipeline
projects.description: A production LLM observability system that captures 9 metrics per query — latency, token usage, cost, faithfulness, context recall, quality drift — with automated CI/CD evaluation via GitHub Actions.
projects.longDescription: Engineered a FastAPI middleware that captures 9 metrics per query (latency, token usage, cost, faithfulness, context recall, quality drift) and persists them to SQLite, with Langfuse for per-call tracing. Pinpointed retrieval bottlenecks through p95 latency analysis, cutting mean response latency 32% via chunk optimisation (average query cost $0.0023). Automated a GitHub Actions + MLflow eval pipeline that runs RAGAS on every push to main and fails the build if faithfulness drops below 0.75. Streamlit dashboard with Slack webhook alerts on quality drift.

projects.title: MCQ Generator
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Multiple Choice Question Generator
projects.description: An AI-powered web application that automatically generates multiple-choice questions from uploaded documents (.pdf, .docx, .txt), designed to assist educators and exam creators.
projects.longDescription: Built with LangChain and OpenAI GPT-4, this app accepts document uploads in PDF, DOCX, or TXT formats and generates customizable MCQs through a four-stage workflow: file upload, text extraction, LLM-based question generation, and results display with export options. Users can set the number of questions and export results in .txt or .pdf format. Containerized with Docker for easy deployment.

projects.title: Walmart Data Analysis
projects.subtitle: SQL + Python End-to-End Data Analytics Project
projects.description: An end-to-end data analysis solution that extracts critical business insights from Walmart sales data through Python processing, SQL querying, and structured problem-solving methodologies.
projects.longDescription: Complete analytical workflow covering environment setup, data acquisition via Kaggle API, cleaning and validation, feature engineering (transaction totals), and loading into MySQL and PostgreSQL. Complex SQL queries address business questions around sales trends, profitability, and customer behaviour patterns. Built with pandas, numpy, and sqlalchemy for the data pipeline layer.

projects.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Business Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Tableau dashboard designed to transform raw HR data into actionable insights on employee attrition, performance, and workforce trends.
projects.longDescription: Built an end-to-end business intelligence solution that cleans and transforms raw HR datasets into a rich interactive Tableau dashboard. Surfaces key workforce metrics including employee attrition rates, performance distributions, department-level headcount trends, and demographic breakdowns. Designed for HR managers and business leaders to drill down into specific segments and make data-driven decisions around retention and talent strategy.

publications.title: Code Narrator: An Autonomous Agentic Framework for Multi-Modal Software Documentation and Video Tutorial Synthesis
publications.description: Research paper presenting an autonomous agentic framework that converts GitHub repositories into structured multi-modal documentation and narrated video tutorials using LLMs and agentic pipelines.
